prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约7682名、7774名、7894名、7371名、7531名，整体在7300–7900名区间波动，近两年呈小幅震荡态势；2025年基 准位次约7531名；该校在津招生计划2021–2023年均为78人，2024–2025年增至79人；2026年计划缩减至67人，较2025年减少约15.2%，属于 明显缩招，理论上使竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名，近年排名在48–62名之间波动 ，整体处于中上水平；该校在2026年声誉评价文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件，抖音综合热度排名未进入前106名，关注度一般；近年无投档线断档或异常记 录，声誉环境平稳；学科评；该校以石油石化特色见长，石油工程、油气储运工程等为传统 优势方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，石油工程相关；天津市2026年高考报名总人数约82000人（ 较2025年71938人增加约14%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；2026年；该校位于北京市，属直辖市异地办学，对天津考生具有一定地域 吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7531名、2026年计划大幅缩招（-15.2%）使位次趋降、天津考生总数显著增加（+14%）使竞 争加剧等多重因素，缩招效应略大于考生增量效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（位次数字减小，更易进）；预测最低位次约7045名，区间6545–7545名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约7045名，区间6545–7545名。建议位次在预测区间内的考生以二档专业为主力选择，一档专业可冲刺（尤其计算机、自动化等热门方向），三档专业作为保底。位次明 显优于区间上限（如6500名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（石油工程创新班、计算机等）；位次接近区间下限（如7500名左右）建议以二档和三档为主，稳妥录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin comprehensive subjects were approximately 7682, 7774, 7894, 7371, and 7531, fluctuating within the range of 7300–7900, with slight volatility in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 7531; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin was 78 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 79 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 67 students, a decrease of about 15.2% compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction, theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is about 62nd, fluctuating between 48th and 62nd in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level; no significant negative or positive events appeared in the 2026 reputation evaluation file, and its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking did not enter the top 106, with average attention; no abnormal admission score breaks or records in recent years, with a stable reputation environment; discipline evaluation: the university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering as traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity, while petroleum engineering-related majors are also popular; the total number of Tianjin college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is about 82,000 (an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025), with the expansion of candidates intensifying competition; in 2026; the university is located in Beijing, a municipality directly under the central government, offering off-site schooling, which has a certain regional appeal to Tianjin candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7531, a significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-15.2%) causing rankings to decrease, and a notable increase in Tianjin candidates (+14%) intensifying competition, the reduction effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (smaller ranking number, easier to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 7045, with a range of 6545–7545.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 7045, with a range of 6545–7545. It is recommended that candidates within the predicted ranking range choose Tier 2 majors as the main option, Tier 1 majors can be attempted (especially popular directions like computer science and automation), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit (e.g., within 6500) can focus on attempting Tier 1 flagship majors (Petroleum Engineering Innovation Class, Computer Science, etc.); candidates with rankings near the lower limit (e.g., around 7500) are advised to mainly choose Tier 2 and Tier 3 majors for a safe admission.
